user.message: Đọc email gần nhất trong danh sách đó và tóm tắt nội dung chính cho mình.

agent.message:
Cần xác nhận trước khi thực hiện.

Mình sẽ đọc nội dung email này. Xác nhận không?

renderMode: text

Trả lời một trong các lệnh:
- approve
- reject
- revise <nội dung muốn chỉnh>

Email gần nhất là từ The Google Workspace Team, nội dung chính là giới thiệu các tính năng AI mới của Google Workspace, đặc biệt cho Google Vids và Gmail.

Tóm tắt nhanh:
- Có các cập nhật mới để tăng năng suất và sáng tạo.
- Google Vids có thêm:
  - AI avatars tuỳ chỉnh
  - Điều khiển avatar chính xác hơn bằng Veo 3.1
  - Trình ghi màn hình miễn phí
  - Voiceover AI đa ngôn ngữ
- Email cũng mời bạn xem thử các tính năng mới này qua liên kết đính kèm.

Nếu bạn muốn, mình có thể tóm tắt ngắn hơn nữa thành 1 câu.

͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­

[Image: Google Workspace]

https://c.gle/AOPyDKSQkuLNQYT3ZTkTeCBsIRMdR0le0AFauRA3maN7NyfXcK9oDJHKapQ7ohc1HSuFyuYHJ3GRJCoYansqJrukMTwT31RB2SA77CO3KHc7io3d0N_XTlMcwdi10h6ImpXbuhe86hDUFohIDlNVlfVT6mkI2uyH0lbYxj9Kjw1_juR7_IQVzYxwpYIHLgMY3SSSjXGjQOtj7K3zQgNaaUL-85S13iCjUXlIixAactCsiRIhzUCPXp-PbxSv2yzvH8w

Create, coordinate, and collaborate faster with new Gemini updates

Whether you're elevating your next big pitch with AI avatars and voiceovers in Vids or finding the perfect meeting time in Gmail, these new tools are built to keep your momentum going.

See new tools in action (https://c.gle/AOPyDKRmWjnyj55YAuOKY6nPZIFuLYi_td9k8bt5HfS98R1h2DxysMxH3mijl2BJfNbLBVovtsUzhBnDNyabMczV18D1LuD7yvOBHGisyuSDKOQ6jcEGPrJKAf2N1lurYD_4NRUHKZ_HtmslA0xaciry8TIQ7g-nNrinIvMa8xrLEfkRQya8Ss0-EjmjbCVtsNc78aYlocH0SITNAtiL-IK46pA8to0NBieGiCtdWIPjDT8l6P0jwTmQ_a8MNr4cVK6Nz4EStoifCbWI)

Here’s what’s new in Google Vids:

Custom AI avatars
New advanced settings allow you to create avatars with specific appearance, apparel, and settings to match your brand identity.

Precise avatar direction
Powered by Veo 3.1, you can now place avatars in specific scenes and have them interact directly with your uploaded product images.

Free screen recorder
Quickly record your screen and webcam with the Vids Screen Recorder Chrome extension (https://c.gle/AOPyDKRSHSTpzq3X0ZXBFPj7GfpA5UITtUPkE5JCPCn-yPEigappXFxk2-TLygJQ2BfgB5PdZDEpLcryWV-PHIVd1qdRkdWvDRiugVqWGWAofMmR879Vl2g4WXKrbv9YXWVgJtUG8Su0fmQHED6BBnn4GVpFuT0IR3C87oVIvyRPby7LGecBNb2NKHegUcDzwXPmY0Sk5ri0LE6o849H8uDjlzHxjoVsbeMJQ8ik1yYeJ9tefG_zAUU3b0yOf8HSKXsZER7Mgiz8_bwMoKUhYnhpHGFAh6UPCs8b0YWOOAWah1g8kBDNG6UjutBUfzjNyBzvxb3wD-mfzaCZx-dAZct3Rtj6DpLsiOhFwB144NSs9VS7oGiMiwnw_d4T1yEsOqv-8ueaBk5gSB-i) , featuring AI editing to auto-remove ums and ahs.

Multi-language AI voiceovers
Create conversational, scripted AI voiceovers in 24 languages (including: Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, French, German, Japanese, Korean and more).

Try new Vids features (https://c.gle/AOPyDKRrykpU_1mk7K50IAkx2-UdZqod0anL-Ne4ghUXD1O7kML78w_So-cdHs24q4dRRXez1dlvfgI8gviNNVzXaRzOtLQqBUfA_QY7D82nsPhrAl46YfNJn8S_0FUZ4ekmL_GreKPASlggGTPXPiSryVLBmGRdNNW5W4Uy1Hv1YftSYHL-GJrHl91XWkGGvsvs1wGc3T-uWkZeaEiGtlxYRkH3ZE_Lc05a-TBsWe5ZrYObEKchNqsyo10a6uGCGwuwXYJpG7r56HOx5cShvg0OUgQft1oBE5wBYO7W1EHLmMo)

Don't miss out on these new Gemini updates:

https://c.gle/AOPyDKR-uLf4vc-lN7iq7SdgNh6JNtL9ZIQgOE287Kqrb1qhI8ehQZmiFhY4p59N1jT3TAe5UFrW66ehe8XmhU_RLwrbvrCQeWyb2o1YV0zqqfJVpha9RNt-GKK65HMytm9f-62EVkPEDLK_Xf5OtfvMthb14VyVs5bS5ZhmKqoW30ATp-gPqAtOgXFMwCqi5LUELJGiNVPl_5x13ydgbFwoMLQGllUE1CLFXXCQMgxSslXdVyI6cZ_uxkUgky_CyO_MgVB6SVK_7HaYEx9Osyg-AbP0nnU

Schedule meetings for the whole team instantly

With Help me schedule in Gmail (https://c.gle/AOPyDKSyd2tSnw37x6dS7PnBjW9Zc-oDlkGXBITYsU2fZIrWGCm4gPndQLHaCEAvjRu4UOHHYKwJ6_dsTEXPYvG5aB1v7MA_tcoPKIIynfExo3PJPj795u40cpZr3ceq0jEKKJYHaSW_P20cvDanUWgSOUQ_SU0DBQjKbPsoOmaWaS6KpnpIanSKJFUaCxLVzk6Vi0DKHcqR2tvkaZBpd6BfhC3Q40hjOMFsQLslJTpAVOwErOLepwsFV2fPbEuzpp-Gbf3TyJxbYJIIp0QZ5ntkWrTGrlGILm6nh81XBeU) , Gemini now detects when you need a group meeting and suggests optimal times for all guests directly within your Gmail to make scheduling a breeze.

https://c.gle/AOPyDKRTiE0aTojUMebwjciO6ffiQDqATNCv6cZj_Qw-ufPelih_fbBRaTJjmMyG4cz6OXi79fqMNZtUaDTC2vjdBi29hf9yblJANmJL4AWDCF4kTAa7SBdvR8H7kBHwbvs9hYGFIN3aMJHAfA_YAee4MTxytpnDRTJlXZJrhYH1zv3wSvjiBzDTQLRp5s5wtitpqJU0f_7x9x_Nn7fQx4W2eZ9GTtdZ5WHOGzqUfFHgASAUoNrxnp27FYhQ4n2Y0qeCUeKTM7cB7Cs

Resume your past conversations with Gemini

Never lose track of a great idea. You can now access your private Gemini conversation history (https://c.gle/AOPyDKR6yGEzMq53aAVwhIBDyB_OcKtGRuERWOc9HkFkomy5AYXFa25dbtSQyAc4lk0Kix58FKBXNpV8uO5Z7TX12hbOONLaxRvt_3huQCeNJm9lKUQOZfsOiUdXJPq4g5WGrst4ol30ahVxhD5jh61HWFryYXpKwVWRIEjs6zFklLCQ--YPITj5MHxGSa1MPrDwmr9WaZdTu6gbtrtTq6lDUkSd55Up5tq74GFzSH2XDy2LLG_eyW6R2xBnX1oX5_zqsr_pxPWyEvbbWa1IJYpODvqtnC9IA_5-YuVWtg) directly in apps like Gmail, Docs, Slides, or Sheets. Just click the spark icon in the top right corner of the side panel to pick up where you left off.

© 2026 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

Please note that some Gemini features may not be available in all languages at this time. Full language availability details can be found here (https://c.gle/AOPyDKQCT7ZRGJR8tgyl7f8PW9utwjpTCPifb5T3rn_aX4hFDRwUyteDQmPH0AQ_4C0PeU0gF_As1aLf17zi1F3pqDR5-pGx42mqaUbFvVSj67v9BIpY4qpDZ1zjb5Wd02Jw8vgaoMgKC0uhYwn6CBP_Uv1Kj5zHTXdjdNeLB_eAp0Y8bXNOJchEC77k8a17pn_xMbpRzM3F3xd5z00V) .

This email was sent to hainx@vclaw.site because you or your administrator signed you up to receive news, product updates, and tips about Google Workspace. Please note that some features highlighted in these emails might not be deployed by your organization. If you don’t want to receive such emails in the future, please unsubscribe here (https://myaccount.google.com/communication-preferences/unsubscribe/gt/AOPyDKQ5f6ptkY2VCf66MHcBvMUthOfS4wB9_7MIfGqkqWtIn3K5QrJ1i0n74ciOW2rJHrm5aZFNrYBFdM2_eWiaK2Nw-Vmdny1M7utnnpjEmsPwZiV508Hu3kAXUZpHfIzumKpWNW9yPq-b052ycrZ9sfhm5w6Z3QuR4dGz-vKvxR0ny3uqJfRmrwAaxGtlj1BAiieqYngN-FE9bf2F6Mp96ykinMB1NOABc5fK5RpcZfQmWb_hHmqF8vBdSf6Z4CGSbhm7AzHb1OBwecdK4ifs?utm_source=gm&utm_medium=email&auto=true) .","Truncated":false,"PreviewChars":1600}}

Here’s what’s new in Google Vids:

Custom AI avatars
New advanced settings allow you to create avatars with specific appearance, apparel, and settings to match your brand identity.

Precise avatar direction
Powered by Veo 3.1, you can now place avatars in specific scenes and have them interact directly with your uploaded product images.

Free screen recorder
Quickly record your screen and webcam with the Vids Screen Recorder Chrome extension, featuring AI editing to auto-remove ums and ahs.

Multi-language AI voiceovers
Create conversational, scripted AI voiceovers in 24 languages (including: Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, French, German, Japanese, Korean and more).

Try new Vids features
 

Don't miss out on these new Gemini updates:

Schedule meetings for the whole team instantly

With Help me schedule in Gmail, Gemini now detects when you need a group meeting and suggests optimal times for all guests directly within your Gmail to make scheduling a breeze.

Resume your past conversations with Gemini

Never lose track of a great idea. You can now access your private Gemini conversation history directly in apps like Gmail, Docs, Slides, or Sheets. Just click the spark icon in the top right corner of the side panel to pick up where you left off.

© 2026 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

 

Please note that some Gemini features may not be available in all languages at this time. Full language availability details can be found here.
